name: Aurskog Sparebank
summary: Aurskog Sparebank provides various banking products and services. The company accepts savings accounts; and offers mortgage, car, other vehicle, construction, green business, and corporate loans, as well as small loans and refinancing. It also offers various bank cards; insurance products and services; and pension, guarantee, overdraft, leasing, and mobile and online banking services. The company operates through its branches in Bj√É¬∏rkelangen, √É¬Örnes, Jessheim, and S√É¬∏rumsand, Norway. Aurskog Sparebank was founded in 1846 and is headquartered in Aurskog, Norway.
